title: Minestuck: Rocketry
description: Allows Ad Astra rockets to fly to Minestuck's Skaia and Hivecraft's Alternia dimensions
body:
Minestuck: Rocketry is a compatability addon for Ad Astra and Minestuck (And optionally Hivecraft) that allows Ad Astra's rockets to fly to Skaia and Alternia, as well as set up space stations in their orbits. It also adds Grist costs to every* item from Ad Astra, and Alchemy recipes for all of Ad Astra's globes.

*Not including Netherite Space Suit or Jet Suit.

Requires [Minestuck](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minestuck), [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), and [Hivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/hivecraft)**

**Only when using the [trollplanet version](https://modrinth.com/mod/minestuck-rocketry/version/1.0.0.trollplanet). If Hivecraft is not installed, use the [default version](https://modrinth.com/mod/minestuck-rocketry/version/1.0.0).

Please report any bugs in [my discord server!](https://discord.gg/VqGaEVWYa6)
